flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Red Rocks Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.4k → $4.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Red Rocks Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($15.8k → $17.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Red Rocks Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Red Rocks Community College rose 45% between 2021 and 2024 (22.1% → 32.0%).
